( 1 ) PT "pPWf ^JT "tff^T ^W "SricTCTttf Spftrl STfq^nT (3T«ra sfft 3 ^ «4*MT ^T "^cH sffc *T^ cWT ^ T ^ 3RT ftW sfa ^Tc?) tf?lt*RfWT, 2011 t I (2) "4 '<M*M 3 y*ivw ^>t <rrcter^itir^cr#1 i 2. 3riTT^3Tt^arf*ra^(3*i^3faa^ ^ f m 5 ^ 3*T-fm (1) 3 , — (i) *'(1) "3<T-ft*m (2) -$**W«H* ^ <R«pftH" +W*T, 3fc?f 3fa 7T8?f ^JT # T fr^TT ^T^TT; (ii) T&ffi 3 'fatfr ^Wt^l ^»T 3*raTO>cTl ^ t I [ m U 5/36/2007-dU$>0*MltU] ^opBT ^plK, U^M ufafl fenprr : T^T 1*PnT, *mcT ^ TFSPTJT 3 *TT.^.ft. 137(3T), *ti® 27-2-2009 3 y^lfelcl fa^ 1H 3 afo tTc^T^ m^lft. 339(31),'cmtTST 15-5:2009 s f l m m f t . 827(3T),Tff^g 16-11-2009 SRT^tffeTcf ^R I MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th May, 2011 GS.R. 397(E).—In exercise ofthe powers conferred by clause (mc) of sub-section (2)of Section 63 read with sub- section (1) of Section 53G ofthe Competition Act, 2002 (12 of 2003), the Central Government hereby makes the following 1871 Gl/2011 . (L) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART n—SEC. 3(i)] rules, further to amend the Competition Appellate Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and other terms and conditions of service of the Chairperson and other Members) Rules, 2009, namely:— (1) These rules may be called the Competition Appellate Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and other terms and conditions of service of the Chairperson and other Members) Amendment Rules, 2011. (2) They shall come into force from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Competition Appellate Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and other terms and conditions of service of the Chairperson and other Members) Rules, 2009, in rule 5, in sub-rule (1),— (i) the brackets, figures and words "(1) Subject to the provisions of sub-rule (2)", shall be omitted; (ii) in the proviso, for the words "to received"; the words "to receive" shall be substituted. [F.No.5/36/2007-IGC/CS] RENUKA KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note:—The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide GS.R. 137(E) dated 27-2-2009 and subsequently amended vide GS.R. 339(E) dated 15-5-2009 and GS.R. 827(E) dated 16-11-2009. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
